description_long: This trash bin is constructed from vertical and horizontal dark brown metal bars, forming a rectangular cage-like structure. The bars are reinforced at their intersections with round, gold-colored rivets, giving the bin a robust and industrial appearance. The open framework allows visibility and airflow through the bin, with no solid panels or liners visible inside. The top is completely open, providing easy access for depositing waste, while the bottom appears to be a solid platform to contain trash. There are no visible handles, wheels, or signage on the exterior. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for outdoor urban environments such as parks or sidewalks.
description: A rectangular, cage-style metal trash bin with gold rivet accents and an open top, designed for outdoor urban use. The structure is robust and industrial, with no handles, wheels, or visible signage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vertical bars and gold rivets clearly, with the open top and solid bottom visible.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the uniformity of the vertical bars and open framework.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with the same arrangement of bars and rivets, and no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the consistent bar and rivet pattern, with no distinguishing features.
